title: styphelia reflexa
intro: Styphelia reflexa, also known as mountain pepper, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Styphelia reflexa include relief from respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, and its anti-inflammatory properties may help to reduce pain and inflammation. Styphelia reflexa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing individuals to harness its medicinal properties in a variety of ways.
